stages.objective: Observe locality windows in repeated access pattern.
stages.goal: Identify hot-page reuse opportunities in trace.
stages.theory_detail: Temporal locality means recently used pages are likely to be used again soon.

hints.nudge: Find repeated page references close together.
hints.concept: Locality benefits appear when capacity preserves hot set.
hints.explicit: Mark hot pages and confirm whether revisits hit or fault.

stages.objective: Diagnose whether baseline config captures locality effectively.
stages.goal: Pass baseline checks and explain observed reuse behavior.

hints.nudge: Compare early misses to later accesses.
hints.concept: A good locality window reduces later misses.
hints.explicit: Run full scenario and compare hit/fault trend over time.

stages.objective: Tune memory parameters to improve locality outcome.
stages.goal: Satisfy lte fault check using bounded config changes.

hints.concept: Small capacity changes can keep the hot working set resident.
hints.explicit: Apply one frame/TLB change, rerun, and submit when fault_lte passes.
